description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a high-mounted straight wing configuration. The aircraft features a tricycle landing gear setup with two main wheels and a nose wheel, all of which appear fixed and non-retractable. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted low on the tail. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed, likely accommodating one or two seats, with a clear canopy and side windows. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration. The exterior is primarily white with some colored striping along the fuselage and tail, and the surface appears smooth and glossy.
description: A small, white, single-engine airplane with a high-mounted straight wing, tricycle landing gear, and a sleek, enclosed cockpit at the front. The aircraft features a conventional tail and a nose-mounted propeller.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted straight wing, nose-mounted propeller, and colored striping along the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, nose wheel, and the propeller at the nose of the airplane.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail section, high wing, and the fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the horizontal and vertical stabilizers, as well as the main landing gear and the full wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and low-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
